'''Nym's slugthrower-carbine''' was a weapon produced by [[Nym/Legends|Nym]]. This [[Slugthrower/Legends|slugthrower]] featured a liquid piston shock-absorbing stock assembly, and an advanced heat dissipation system for greater firepower, allowing for longer bursts exceeding most other carbines.

==Behind the scenes==
[[File:MountedNymsSlugthrowerCarbine-SWG.jpg|250px|thumb|A mounted version of the famous Nym's slugthrower]]
''Star Wars Galaxies'' uses the same 3D model for Nym's slugthrower and the [[Corestrike Rancor]].
